slice1_skeleton_note: Slice 1 placeholder. Final tolerance values will be set in Slice 2 after the upstream calculation chain is wired up.
slice2_status: Slice 2 contract: tolerance drift forbidden without explicit design-amendment (per frozen design §7.4). Amendment-001 (TASK-019-AMEND-001-FREEZE-VECTORS) freezes the per-field tolerance values listed in tolerance_profiles (TASK-019-GOLDEN-TOLERANCE-V2-AMEND-001). Tolerances are derived from the deterministic numerical behavior of the frozen TASK-006/007/008/017/018 contracts and the CoolProp property provider's documented numerical accuracy at the operating envelope; per-field basis notes are in tolerance_profiles.TASK-019-GOLDEN-TOLERANCE-V2-AMEND-001.per_field_basis. No new blocker / warning codes were introduced; no schema was widened.
amendment_002a_tolerance_status: NO_NUMERIC_TOLERANCE_CHANGE: Amendment 002-A does NOT widen or introduce any numeric tolerance. The three new geometry material property fields (wall_thermal_conductivity_w_m_k, inner_surface_roughness_m, annulus_surface_roughness_m) are case-bound frozen input vectors, not output comparison values, and therefore are not subject to numeric tolerance comparison in the validation report. The existing per-field tolerances for case_01 expected_output (heat_duty_W, h_annulus, h_tube, outlet_T_cold, outlet_T_hot, LMTD_counterflow_K) are derived from the deterministic numerical behavior of the TASK-006/007/008 frozen contracts and the CoolProp provider's documented numerical accuracy; the addition of three new explicit input keys does not change those derivations.
amendment_002e_tolerance_numeric_status: NUMERIC_TOLERANCES_UNCHANGED: The numeric tolerance values for the six case_01 expected_output fields (heat_duty_W abs=100.0 rel=0.01; LMTD_counterflow_K abs=0.5 rel=0.02; annulus_side_W_m2_K abs=100.0 rel=0.05; tube_side_W_m2_K abs=100.0 rel=0.05; outlet_temperatures_K abs=0.5 rel=0.002) are preserved verbatim from Amendment 001. Amendment 002-E re-freezes the expected_output central values from the production chain (not from hand-calculated Kern 1950 values) but does not widen, narrow, or re-derive the numeric tolerances. The tolerances remain justified by the deterministic numerical behavior of the TASK-006/007/008 frozen contracts and the CoolProp provider's documented numerical accuracy; the per-field basis strings are updated to reference Amendment 002-E and the new non-transitional operating point.
amendment_002e_case_02_case_03_tolerance: NO_CHANGE: case_02 and case_03 per-field tolerance entries are preserved byte-for-byte. Amendment 002-E is case_01 only.

TASK-019-GOLDEN-TOLERANCE-V1-SLICE-1.currency_minor_units: integer ONLY (no float for money per frozen design §3.3)
TASK-019-GOLDEN-TOLERANCE-V1-SLICE-1.description: Slice 1 placeholder tolerance profile. Preserved for backward compatibility with the Slice 1 fixture-schema-validation tests that reference this profile by name. Final tolerances for the frozen vectors live in TASK-019-GOLDEN-TOLERANCE-V2-AMEND-001 below.

TASK-019-GOLDEN-TOLERANCE-V2-AMEND-001.comparison_method_default: abs-or-rel whichever is tighter (per frozen design §7.4 + MASTER_DEVELOPMENT_SPEC §15.5)
TASK-019-GOLDEN-TOLERANCE-V2-AMEND-001.currency_minor_units: integer ONLY (no float for money per frozen design §3.3)
TASK-019-GOLDEN-TOLERANCE-V2-AMEND-001.description: TASK-019 amendment-001 frozen tolerance profile. Per-field abs / rel values are derived from the deterministic numerical behavior of the TASK-006/007/008/017/018 frozen upstream contracts and the CoolProp property provider's documented numerical accuracy at the operating envelope. Each per_field entry carries an explicit basis string so the tolerance value is auditable.

per_field_basis.case_01.heat_duty_W: Amendment 002-E re-freeze: production-chain-derived golden vector at the new non-transitional operating point (mass_flow 0.75/0.75 kg/s, Water/HEOS, both Re > 10000 in turbulent regime). Engineering-literature reference (Kern 1950) is superseded for case_01 only. The deterministic numerical behavior of the TASK-006 heat balance + TASK-007 single-phase correlations (Gnielinski-tube / Kern-annulus, turbulent regime) + TASK-008 double-pipe rating + CoolProp provider numerical accuracy (documented < 0.5% at 273-373 K) is the basis for the tolerance value (± 1%).
per_field_basis.case_01.LMTD_counterflow_K: Amendment 002-E re-freeze: production-chain-derived golden vector at the new non-transitional operating point. Closed-form LMTD ± 0.5 K to account for temperature-input tolerance and CoolProp density-derivative numerical accuracy at the operating envelope.
per_field_basis.case_01.heat_transfer_coefficients.annul: Amendment 002-E re-freeze: production-chain-derived golden vector at the new non-transitional operating point, using the annulus_turbulent_gnielinski_dh correlation (applicable, annulus_Re = 11386.37). Engineering-literature reference ± 5% to account for documented annulus-side correlation uncertainty bands (Kern 1950) over the operating envelope.
per_field_basis.case_01.heat_transfer_coefficients.tube_: Amendment 002-E re-freeze: production-chain-derived golden vector at the new non-transitional operating point, using the tube_turbulent_gnielinski correlation (applicable, tube_Re = 75810.66). Engineering-literature reference ± 5% to account for documented tube-side correlation uncertainty bands (Gnielinski) over the operating envelope.
per_field_basis.case_01.outlet_temperatures_K: Amendment 002-E re-freeze: production-chain-derived golden vector at the new non-transitional operating point. Closed-form heat-balance closure ± 0.5 K to account for temperature-input tolerance and CoolProp cp-derivative numerical accuracy.
per_field_basis.case_02.mass_kg.fluid_mass_kg: Density × volume closed-form ± 1% to account for CoolProp density numerical accuracy and the canonical geometry's cylindrical-volume closure.
per_field_basis.case_02.mass_kg.shell_mass_kg: Density × volume closed-form ± 1% to account for SS304 documented density tolerance (per TASK-017 approved material catalog).
per_field_basis.case_02.mass_kg.tube_mass_kg: Density × volume closed-form ± 1% to account for SS304 documented density tolerance (per TASK-017 approved material catalog).
per_field_basis.case_02.mass_kg.total_mass_kg: Closed-form sum of component masses ± 1% (propagated from component tolerances).
per_field_basis.case_02.preliminary_mechanical_check.sta: Categorical (PASS / BLOCKED_PRELIMINARY / BLOCKED_FOR_DETAILED_DESIGN); not numeric; no abs/rel tolerance. Per-field equality is required for PASS.
per_field_basis.case_02.selected_material_ids.shell_mate: Categorical; string equality required for PASS.
per_field_basis.case_02.selected_material_ids.tube_mater: Categorical; string equality required for PASS.
per_field_basis.case_03.cost_components_C0_C1.cost_compo: Engineering-literature cost reference (RSMeans-like 2024 stainless-steel tubing) ± 2% to account for documented regional / temporal cost-source uncertainty bands. Integer minor units per frozen design §3.3.
Engineering-literature cost reference (RSMeans-like 2024 ASME labor) ± 2% to account for documented labor-rate regional / temporal uncertainty. Integer minor units per frozen design §3.3.
Closed-form sum ± 1% (propagated from C0 component tolerances). Integer minor units per frozen design §3.3.
per_field_basis.case_03.cost_components_C0_C1.currency_I: Categorical; string equality required for PASS.
per_field_basis.case_03.discounted_total_minor_units: DEFERRED per TASK-018 §5.3 Option A. No formula is invented in TASK-019 amendment-001. Tolerance is not applicable.
per_field_basis.case_03.salvage_minor_units: DEFERRED per TASK-018 §5.3.2. No formula is invented in TASK-019 amendment-001. The 0 placeholder is preserved verbatim; equality on the 0 placeholder is required for PASS.
per_field_basis.case_03.life_cycle_energy_envelope.life_: Closed-form annual_energy_MJ = heat_duty × annual_operating_hours × fouling_energy_penalty_factor ± 2% (propagated from heat_duty ± 1% and fouling_energy_penalty_factor ± 1%).
Closed-form total = annual × design_life_years ± 2% (propagated from annual tolerance).
Categorical; integer equality required for PASS.
Categorical; integer equality required for PASS.
per_field_basis.case_03.life_cycle_energy_envelope.block: Categorical; list equality required for PASS.
per_field_basis.case_03.selected_cost_model.selected_mod: Categorical; string equality required for PASS.
per_field_basis.case_03.selected_cost_model.selection_bl: Categorical; list equality required for PASS.
